single_container.label: Single Container
single_container.template:
<DraggableProvider
    initialItems={initialItems}
    onReorder={setItems}{{Provider.props}}
>
  <Draggable{{props}}>
    <Draggable.Container
        container="tasks"{{Container.props}}
    >
      <Flex
          gap="xs"
          orientation="column"
      >
        {items.map(({ id, text }) => (
          <Draggable.Item
              container="tasks"
              dragId={id}
              key={id}{{Item.props}}
          >
            <Card padding="xs">
              <Body text={text} />
            </Card>
          </Draggable.Item>
        ))}
      </Flex>
    </Draggable.Container>
  </Draggable>
</DraggableProvider>

single_container_horizontal.label: Single Container Horizontal
single_container_horizontal.template:
<Flex>
  <DraggableProvider
      initialItems={initialItems}
      onReorder={setItems}{{Provider.props}}
  >
    <Draggable.Container{{Container.props}}>
      <Flex
          alignItems="stretch"
          flexDirection="row"
          height="110px"
      >
        {items.map(({ id, url }) => (
          <Draggable.Item
              dragId={id}
              key={id}
              marginRight="sm"{{Item.props}}
          >
            <Image
                alt={id}
                size="md"
                url={url}
            />
          </Draggable.Item>
        ))}
      </Flex>
    </Draggable.Container>
  </DraggableProvider>
</Flex>

multiple_containers.label: Multiple Containers
multiple_containers.template:
<DraggableProvider
    initialItems={initialItems}
    onReorder={setItems}{{Provider.props}}
>
  <Draggable{{props}}>
    <Flex
        align="start"
        gap="sm"
        wrap
    >
      {containers.map((container) => (
        <Draggable.Container
            container={container}
            key={container}
            minWidth="220px"{{Container.props}}
        >
          <Card padding="sm">
            <Title
                marginBottom="xs"
                size={4}
                text={container}
            />
            <Flex
                gap="xs"
                orientation="column"
            >
              {items
                .filter((item) => item.container === container)
                .map(({ id, text }) => (
                  <Draggable.Item
                      container={container}
                      dragId={id}
                      key={id}{{Item.props}}
                  >
                    <Card padding="xs">
                      <Body text={text} />
                    </Card>
                  </Draggable.Item>
                ))}
            </Flex>
          </Card>
        </Draggable.Container>
      ))}
    </Flex>
  </Draggable>
</DraggableProvider>

single_list.message: Single List wraps Draggable.Container and Draggable.Item children in DraggableProvider with initialItems and onReorder.

outline_drop_zone.message: Outline Drop Zone passes a dropZone object to DraggableProvider so the dragged item uses the outline treatment.

shadow_drop_zone.message: Shadow Drop Zone uses the provider dropZone color and type to preview the shadow treatment while dragging.

line_vertical.message: Line Vertical uses dropZone.direction="vertical" for between-row placement.

line_horizontal.message: Line Horizontal uses dropZone.direction="horizontal" for between-column placement.

multiple_containers.message: Multiple Containers maps items into Draggable.Container columns by their container value.

cross_container_preview.message: Cross Container Preview enables provider-managed movement previews between containers before drop.

event_listeners.message: Event Listeners routes item callbacks through Draggable.Item props so drag events can be handled by app code.
